prompt: In the project at /Users/josh_folder/harness-simple/creator-test/markdown-tool-bare/, add a new CLI flag '--watch' that watches the markdown file for changes and auto-refreshes the preview. This will need changes to the argument parsing, a new file watcher module, and integration with the existing preview refresh logic.

assertions.name: classifies_as_medium_or_complex
assertions.check: Classifies task as Medium or Complex with explicit justification

assertions.name: creates_execution_plan
assertions.check: Creates an execution plan document with phases, invariants, scope, and rollback

assertions.name: requests_human_approval
assertions.check: Explicitly asks the user to approve the plan before proceeding

assertions.name: does_not_write_code_directly
assertions.check: Does not directly modify source files

assertions.name: reads_plans_md
assertions.check: References or follows PLANS.md guidelines in the plan structure
